sentences.target: Heute gehen wir in den Circus.

translations.de: Heute gehen wir in den Circus.
translations.en: We’re going to the circus today.
translations.vi: Hôm nay chúng tôi đi xem xiếc.
translations.nl: Vandaag gaan we naar het circus.
translations.hi: आज हम सर्कस जा रहे हैं।
translations.nb: I dag skal vi på sirkus.
translations.id: Hari ini kami pergi ke sirkus.
translations.sv: I dag ska vi gå på cirkus.
translations.da: I dag skal vi i cirkus.
translations.ja: 今日はサーカスに行きます。

tokens.explanation: Temporal adverb indicating the time frame ('today').
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person plural (wir gehen); denotes movement.
Personal pronoun, 1st person plural, nominative; subject of the clause.
Preposition; with accusative here to mark direction into a place.
Definite article, masculine accusative singular; determiner of 'Circus' governed by 'in'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'in' (destination).

sentences.target: Der Circus ist wieder in der Stadt.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ ˈʦɪʁkʊs ɪst ˈviːdɐ ɪn deːɐ̯ ʃtat/

translations.de: Der Circus ist wieder in der Stadt.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ ˈʦɪʁkʊs ɪst ˈviːdɐ ɪn deːɐ̯ ʃtat/
translations.en: The circus is back in town.
translations.es: El circo ha vuelto a la ciudad.
translations.fr: Le cirque est de retour en ville.
translations.it: Il circo è tornato in città.
translations.yue: 馬戲團又返嚟我哋呢頭喇。
translations.pt: O circo está de volta à cidade.
translations.vi: Rạp xiếc đã trở lại thành phố.
translations.nl: Het circus is weer in de stad.
translations.hu: A cirkusz újra a városban van.
translations.hi: सर्कस फिर से शहर में आ गया है।
translations.el: Το τσίρκο είναι ξανά στην πόλη.
translations.ja: サーカスがまた街に来ました。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine nominative singular; determiner of the subject noun.
Common noun, masculine singular; subject of the clause.
Copular auxiliary, present 3rd person singular; links the subject to a predicate (locative PP).
Adverb meaning 'again'; indicates repetition.
Preposition; with dative to indicate static location.
Definite article, feminine dative singular; determiner of 'Stadt' after 'in' (location).
Common noun, feminine singular, dative; object of the preposition 'in' expressing location.

sentences.target: Ich kaufe zwei Karten für den Circus.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈkaʊfə tsvaɪ̯ ˈkaʁtən fyːɐ̯ deːn ˈʦɪʁkʊs/

translations.de: Ich kaufe zwei Karten für den Circus.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈkaʊfə tsvaɪ̯ ˈkaʁtən fyːɐ̯ deːn ˈʦɪʁkʊs/
translations.en: I’m buying two tickets for the circus.
translations.es: Voy a comprar dos entradas para el circo.
translations.fr: J'achète deux billets pour le cirque.
translations.it: Compro due biglietti per il circo.
translations.zh-Hans: 我要买两张马戏团的票。
translations.ru: Я покупаю два билета в цирк.
translations.pt: Vou comprar dois ingressos para o circo.
translations.vi: Tôi đang mua hai vé xem xiếc.
translations.nl: Ik koop twee kaartjes voor het circus.
translations.uk: Я купую два квитки в цирк.
translations.hi: मैं सर्कस के लिए दो टिकट खरीद रहा हूँ।
translations.el: Αγοράζω δύο εισιτήρια για το τσίρκο.
translations.nb: Jeg kjøper to billetter til sirkuset.
translations.id: Saya membeli dua tiket untuk sirkus.
translations.sv: Jag köper två biljetter till cirkus.
translations.da: Jeg køber to billetter til cirkus.
translations.ja: サーカスのチケットを二枚買います。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; denotes the act of purchasing.
Cardinal numeral; quantifies the following noun.
Common noun, plural accusative; direct object of 'kaufe' quantified by 'zwei'.
Preposition; governs accusative, indicating purpose/recipient.
Definite article, masculine accusative singular; determiner of 'Circus' after 'für'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'für'.

sentences.target: Die Kinder lachen laut im Circus.

translations.de: Die Kinder lachen laut im Circus.
translations.en: The children are laughing loudly at the circus.
translations.es: Los niños se ríen a carcajadas en el circo.
translations.fr: Les enfants rient aux éclats au cirque.
translations.it: I bambini ridono forte al circo.
translations.zh-Hans: 孩子们在马戏团里大声笑。
translations.yue: 啲小朋友喺馬戲團度大聲笑。
translations.pt: As crianças riem alto no circo.
translations.vi: Bọn trẻ cười ầm ĩ ở rạp xiếc.
translations.ar: الأطفال يضحكون بصوت عالٍ في السيرك.
translations.nl: De kinderen lachen hard in het circus.
translations.hu: A gyerekek hangosan nevetnek a cirkuszban.
translations.hi: बच्चे सर्कस में ज़ोर से हँस रहे हैं।
translations.pl: Dzieci głośno śmieją się w cyrku.
translations.el: Τα παιδιά γελάνε δυνατά στο τσίρκο.
translations.cs: Děti se v cirkuse nahlas smějí.
translations.ja: 子どもたちはサーカスで大声で笑っています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, plural nominative; determiner of 'Kinder' (subject).
Common noun, plural nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite intransitive verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural; main predicate.
Adverb modifying 'lachen'; manner of the action.
Contraction of 'in dem'; preposition selecting dative, indicating location.
Common noun, masculine singular, dative; object of the preposition 'im' (location).
